docs-governance.observation: [enterprise-policy] OK — canonical workflow decision contract guard passed, R2 enterprise controls enforced

nonBlockingIssues.description: The deprecated /audit/digest endpoint is correctly marked deprecated in docs but still exists in the OpenAPI contract. A future task should track actual endpoint removal or @Deprecated annotation in the controller.
purchasing.md and inventory.md module-level Known Limitations sections lack deferral notes to RECOMMENDATIONS.md, while their corresponding flow packets already have them. Minor consistency gap.
ERP-DOD-BIBLE.md still contains 'Open Decisions' headings internally (lines 695, 1296, 1676), but the file-level NON-CANONICAL banner makes this acceptable.

rejectedObservations.reason: Already fixed in round 2 — docs-authoritative-followup-consistency-polish confirmed endpoint-inventory.md already has ⚠️ deprecated markers on audit/digest endpoints at lines 72-73

rejectedObservations.observation: Profile audit gap documented in three places risks drift
rejectedObservations.reason: Redundancy is acceptable — each document serves a different audience and the bidirectional references provide cross-checking. Not a systemic concern.

rejectedObservations.observation: Inconsistent deferral notes between flow packets and module packets
rejectedObservations.reason: Already partially addressed — docs-authoritative-followup-consistency-polish added deferral notes to inventory.md and purchasing.md. The remaining gap is minor and non-blocking.
